name: medellin_pajarito
notes: Planned hillside expansion on Medellin's northwestern slopes (Pajarito / Ciudadela Nuevo Occidente), metrocable-served social housing at height. Steep terrain makes the green network and short walks decisive; slopes belong in the unbuildable layer. Densities are indicative tiers at household 3.1; confirm against POT zoning.  Terrain steeper than 20 degrees is fetched into the unbuildable layer from the open global DEM.
